w:r.w:t: IL will take Pupils in the garden and they will pick dry leaves and wrappers and throw in the dustbins. (Send notice via diaries bring empty yogurt boxes)
Pupils will do plantation in empty yogurt boxes and write their names on those boxes.
IL will show pictures of animals Pupils will identify wild and pet animals
Pupils will come and tell about their pet animals.
IL will explain the activities, and after that they will do their work independently on booklet.
IL will mention day and date on top of the
page # 15 & 16. IL will mention the day and date on top of the page and check at the end. Pupils will do activities on page number 16.
Send notice in diaries “bring papaya or papaya juice/Jam in lunch”.
record the height and then weight of each of the pupils.
Enter measurement in the height and weight chart against the current date.
What is the National game of Pakistan? Ans:
Hockey is the national game of Pakistan.
Where do Muslims go for Prayers? Ans:
Tell the names of 5 pet animals.
Dog, Cat, Parrot, Fish and Rabbit.
